code_sync_points_observed.mori_aiter.backward.dispatch_grad_output: grad_total_recv.item() forces host visibility of MORI receive count.
code_sync_points_observed.mori_aiter.backward.dispatch_topk_dummy: topk_total_recv.item() forces host visibility of MORI receive count.
code_sync_points_observed.mori_aiter.backward.dispatch_x: total_recv.item() forces host visibility of MORI receive count.
code_sync_points_observed.mori_aiter.local_padded_vjp.sort_counts: counts.max().item() forces host visibility of per-expert padding shape.

findings: The large shared_expert_or_dense_feed_forward_backward envelope is not clean raw dense GEMM time: largest dsv4.linear.feed_forward.w2.bwd events include nested recomputed dsv4.block.moe/mori_aiter_bridge plus allocator and c10d/hip synchronization, while inner dinput/dweight scopes are sub-ms in the sampled longest events.
EP4 and EP8 both keep mori_aiter.backward.routed_vjp around 6.7-6.9 s inclusive across the profiled step; EP does not remove this wall in the current implementation.

MoE routed backward is dominated by local padded VJP and MORI combine/dispatch wait surfaces. The local padded VJP includes repeated sort/count/pad scheduling and large SwiGLU forward/backward envelopes.

The code path still has explicit CPU scalar count reads for MORI receive counts and padded max_count; trace children expose these as aten::item/_local_scalar_dense plus hipMemcpy/hipStreamSynchronize waits in the longest routed events.
Attention is not the bulk in the current EP full-run profile: sparse MLA shared-KV is about 0.58-0.59 s inclusive across the profiled step versus multi-second MoE backward buckets.
next_ladder: First remove or hide the MORI count/max_count host syncs: use fixed capacity/metadata from the dispatcher, GPU-side padding schedule, or a fused local grouped VJP path that does not require counts.max().item() per layer in Python.

Replace the padded local VJP with a fused owner-rank training MoE backward: W2 dgrad + SwiGLU backward + W1/W3/W2 wgrad + xgrad/reduce over compact/ragged expert rows, avoiding padded BMM shape setup and extra recompute/materialization.

Keep dense linear backward profiling enabled only as a wrapper diagnostic; do not chase feed_forward.w2.bwd whole-envelope time as raw GEMM until FSDP/recompute nesting is separated by profiler schedule or custom ranges.
For Ascend parity, the AMD port needs the same class of autofused MoE backward pipeline, not only SGLang/MORI forward dispatch/fused-MoE/combine.
purpose: Deeper EP4/EP8 S4096 MBS=1 profiling split for MoE routed VJP and dense MmBackward/FFN envelope.
source_note: Raw Chrome traces stay on /scratch; this artifact is a compact summary for the experiment repo.
